prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Mistfell (masculine guild crafter, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash marks on gloves) and Yuna Silverbrook (androgynous guild coordinator, formal cloak, composed posture); Yuna Mistfell steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Silverbrook guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot; after ten seconds Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark while Yuna Mistfell holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
